nasb.text: He said to me, “Son of man, can these bones live?” And I answered, “O Lord God, You know.”

esv.text: And he said to me, “Son of man, can these bones live?” And I answered, “O Lord God, you know.”

cnv.text: 他問我：“人子啊！這些骸骨能活過來嗎？”我回答：“主耶和華啊！唯有你才知道。”

ccb.text: 祂对我说：“人子啊，这些骸骨能复活吗？”我说：“主耶和华啊，只有你知道。”
